Largest node radius, in px. One enormous clone must not swallow the layout.

Source: R/hla_visual_helpers.R
HLA_NODE_R_MAX.Rd

Largest node radius, in px. One enormous clone must not swallow the layout.

Usage

HLA_NODE_R_MAX

Format

An object of class numeric of length 1.
